data.content: Implementation validated on existing branch feature/terminal-light-theme at 48afce564ebe (clean, already pushed). No new code changes were required in this session because the light-theme implementation was already present in the worktree. Quality gates in /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-8909 all passed: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (1 existing beat-form React Compiler warning only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Browser validation on 2026-03-31 using Playwright against http://127.0.0.1:3001 confirmed shared terminalLightTheme behavior: toggling from the History Debug header switched the live terminal header and panel to dark immediately; toggling from Settings > Defaults switched both live Terminal and History Debug back to light; the live terminal panel background changed between rgb(26, 26, 46) and rgb(250, 250, 250), and the history header gradient changed between dark and light palettes. A full reload and a fresh tab both restored the light theme before further interaction, confirming server-side persistence across sessions.
